sizing_rule.note: Optimal f sizing via scenario analysis and probability weighting. Position size determined parametrically by defining unique outcome scenarios, assigning occurrence probabilities to each, and maximizing asymptotic geometric utility across all scenarios. No fixed f value specified—calculation method itself is the rule.

source_rule_text: Allocate position size using optimal f by defining unique scenarios, assigning probability to each scenario's occurrence, and maximizing utility in an asymptotic geometric sense.
